changeSet.author: hanan
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE upsert_diagnostic_order_test_result( p_order_test_id BIGINT, p_profile_test_id BIGINT, p_result_value_number NUMERIC, p_result_value_text TEXT, p_marker VARCHAR, p_approved_by VARCHAR, p_processing_status VARCHAR, p_normal_range_value VARCHAR, p_created_by VARCHAR ) LANGUAGE plpgsql AS $procedure$ BEGIN INSERT INTO diagnostic_order_tests_result ( order_test_id, profile_test_id, result_value_number, result_value_text, marker, approved_by, approved_date, processing_status, normal_range_value, created_by, created_date ) VALUES ( p_order_test_id, p_profile_test_id, p_result_value_number, p_result_value_text, p_marker, p_approved_by, CASE WHEN p_approved_by IS NOT NULL THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END, COALESCE(p_processing_status, 'NEW'), p_normal_range_value, p_created_by, NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (order_test_id, profile_test_id) DO UPDATE SET result_value_number = EXCLUDED.result_value_number, result_value_text = EXCLUDED.result_value_text, marker = EXCLUDED.marker, approved_by = EXCLUDED.approved_by, approved_date = EXCLUDED.approved_date, processing_status = EXCLUDED.processing_status, normal_range_value = EXCLUDED.normal_range_value, last_modified_by = EXCLUDED.created_by, last_modified_date = NOW(); END; $procedure$;

rollback.sql: DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS upsert_diagnostic_order_test_result( BIGINT, BIGINT, NUMERIC, TEXT, VARCHAR, VARCHAR, VARCHAR, VARCHAR, VARCHAR );
